title: Static Properties and Methods
description: Access members without an object instance.

slides.title: Static Members
Static Example
slides.codeSnippet:
<?php
class MathUtils {
    public static function square($num) {
        return $num * $num;
    }
}
echo MathUtils::square(5);

class Database {
    public static $instanceCount = 0;
    public function __construct() {
        self::$instanceCount++;
    }
}
$db1 = new Database();
$db2 = new Database();
echo Database::$instanceCount;
?>

quizData.question: How do you call a static method `foo` from class `Bar`?
quizData.explanation: Static methods are called using the double colon `::`.
